title: Research stage-based metaprogramming for compiler mods
body:
Researched **stage-8** metaprogramming for **compiler mods**: how generators, analyzers, and rewriters attach to pipeline stages without language-level `meta` blocks (Rust host owns composition).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`33eaa35`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/33eaa35)
- **Subject:** Update semantic analysis docs with current diagnostic codes, rule integration status, and type system progress
- **Completed:** 2026-02-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `metaprogramming-mods`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-tooling-research`

## Relation
Mods integrate at defined compiler stages; language `meta` grammar was **not** revived. Documented alongside semantic-analysis progress in the same research window as staged parser rules.

source.subject: Update semantic analysis docs with current diagnostic codes, rule integration status, and type system progress
